title: Alchemical Emblems — Gallery 1
description: 40 alchemical emblems from the Alchemy Web Site (Adam McLean). Includes Fludd's astrologer consulting the heavens, Jüngken's Chymia experimentalis frontispiece, Marolles' Tableaux du temple des muses, and emblems from the Rosarium philosophorum tradition covering distillation, the hermetic vessel, and the alchemical wedding.
notes: 320 emblems total across 8 galleries. All PD from alchemywebsite.com. Each has JSON metadata with caption and source.
